title: Rumble in the Jungle
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is tricked into a wild Brazilian adventure to help the Bororo save their glowing Heart of Light! 🌴

q.en: Who sent Geronimo the email that began 'Hello from Brazil!'?
q.zh: 是谁给杰罗尼摩发了那封以“来自巴西的问候！”开头的电子邮件？

explain.en: The email was signed, 'Adventurously yours, Bruce Hyena.'
explain.zh: 那封邮件的署名是：“爱冒险的你，布鲁斯·鬣狗。”

q.en: What was Geronimo's secret computer password that Bruce Hyena discovered?
q.zh: 布鲁斯·鬣狗偷看到的杰罗尼摩的电脑密码是什么？

explain.en: Bruce says, 'Your password is cheese. Sorry to say it, Cheesehead, but that's an EXTREMELY EASY one.'
explain.zh: 布鲁斯说：“你的密码是奶酪。奶酪脑袋，这密码太简单了。”

q.en: Who came down the rope into Geronimo's attic to take him to Brazil?
q.zh: 是谁顺着绳子从阁楼下来，把杰罗尼摩带去巴西的？

options.en: Wild Willie and his cousin Maya
options.zh: 野威利和他的表妹玛雅

options.en: Bruce Hyena alone according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 只有布鲁斯·鬣狗（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A rodent 'landed in front of me... It was Wild Willie... It was his cousin Maya!'
explain.zh: “一只老鼠落在我面前……是野威利……那是他的表妹玛雅！”

q.en: What is the capital of Brazil, built in the shape of an airplane?
q.zh: 巴西的首都是哪座城市，它的形状像一架飞机？

explain.en: Wild Willie reads that Brasília 'officially became the capital of Brazil in 1960' and 'is shaped like an AIRPLANE!'
explain.zh: 野威利读到：巴西利亚“于1960年正式成为巴西首都”，而且“形状像一架飞机！”

q.en: What is the largest tropical wetland in the world that Geronimo visits?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩游览的世界上最大的热带湿地是哪里？

explain.en: The book states, 'THE PANTANAL is the largest tropical wetland in the world.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“潘塔纳尔是世界上最大的热带湿地。”

q.en: What precious treasure did the Bororo people guard for generations?
q.zh: 博罗罗人世代守护的珍贵宝物是什么？

options.en: The Heart of Light, a glowing crystal
A golden statue according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一座黄金雕像（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The elder says, 'our most precious treasure: The Heart of Light. It is a crystal shaped like a heart that emits the purest and most marvelous light.'
explain.zh: 长者说：“我们最珍贵的宝物是光明之心，它是一颗心形水晶，散发出最纯净奇妙的光芒。”

q.en: Who is the dishonest rodent that stole the Heart of Light?
q.zh: 是哪个不诚实的老鼠偷走了光明之心？

options.en: Antón Chefrat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 安东大厨鼠（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The elder explains, 'news of this wonderful crystal reached the ears of Jake Darkmouse... One night he and his thugs arrived with an ENORMOUSE helicopter, and they stole the crystal!'
explain.zh: 长者说：“水晶的消息传到了杰克·暗鼠耳中……一天夜里，他带着手下乘着大直升机来偷走了水晶！”

q.en: Who is the tiny mouselet wearing a necklace of red-and-black berries that helps Geronimo?
q.zh: 那位戴着红黑浆果项链、帮助杰罗尼摩的小老鼠女孩是谁？

options.en: Thea according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 蒂拉（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The text says she 'wore a necklace of shiny red-and-black berries' and introduces herself: 'My name is Colibrì.'
explain.zh: 文中说她“戴着一串闪亮的红黑浆果项链”，并自我介绍：“我叫蜂鸟（科利布里）。”

q.en: Which animal gave Geronimo a huge slap with its paw to put him back on the right track?
q.zh: 是哪只动物用爪子狠狠拍了杰罗尼摩一下，让他回到正确的路上？

explain.en: The book says, 'a jaguar appeared before me and gave me a huge slap with its paw, putting me back on the right track!'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“一只美洲豹出现在我面前，用爪子狠狠拍了我一下，让我回到正确的路上！”

q.en: Which of Geronimo's family members greeted him at the airport in New Mouse City?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩回到老鼠岛的机场时，他的哪些家人来迎接他？

options.en: Only his grandfather William according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 只有他的爷爷威廉（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: His sister Thea, cousin Trap, and nephew Benjamin
options.zh: 妹妹蒂拉、表哥特拉普和侄子本杰明

explain.en: The book says, 'my sister Thea, my cousin Trap, and my dear little nephew Benjamin' were there to greet him.
explain.zh: 书中说：“我的妹妹蒂拉、表哥特拉普，还有亲爱的小侄子本杰明”都来迎接他。
